      <p style="font-size:13px; line-height:2.2; color:rgba(232,224,208,0.9);">
        아래 설명의 빈칸에 공통적으로 들어가는 단어를 드롭다운에서 선택하세요.<br><br>
        • 마약 중독과 관련된 신경전달물질은
        <select class="concept-dropdown" id="dd-1" onchange="checkDropdown()">
          <option value="">-- 선택 --</option>
          <option value="아드레날린">아드레날린</option>
          <option value="엔돌핀">엔돌핀</option>
          <option value="도파민">도파민</option>
          <option value="세로토닌">세로토닌</option>
        </select>
        이다.<br><br>
        • 마약을 하게 되면 뇌에서는
        <select class="concept-dropdown" id="dd-2" onchange="checkDropdown()">
          <option value="">-- 선택 --</option>
          <option value="아드레날린">아드레날린</option>
          <option value="엔돌핀">엔돌핀</option>
          <option value="도파민">도파민</option>
          <option value="세로토닌">세로토닌</option>
        </select>
        이 다량으로 방출되어 쾌감을 느끼게 함과 동시에 뇌를 파괴하여
        <select class="concept-dropdown" id="dd-3" onchange="checkDropdown()">
          <option value="">-- 선택 --</option>
          <option value="아드레날린">아드레날린</option>
          <option value="엔돌핀">엔돌핀</option>
          <option value="도파민">도파민</option>
          <option value="세로토닌">세로토닌</option>
        </select>
        의 생성을 감소시킨다.<br><br>
        • 마약을 통해 한번 느낀 쾌감은 기억을 담당하는 뇌(해마)의 깊은 곳에 저장된다. 이 기억은 평생 간다.<br><br>
        • 처음 느꼈던 쾌감을 얻기 위해 계속해서 더 많은 양의 마약을 투약하게 되고 결국 마약에 중독된다.
      </p>
      <div id="dropdown-feedback" style="display:none; margin-top:12px; padding:10px; border-radius:8px;"></div>
    </div>

function startBadgeScene() {
  
  var icon  = document.getElementById('badge-icon');
  var title = document.getElementById('badge-title');
  var name  = document.getElementById('badge-name');
  var desc  = document.getElementById('badge-desc');
  var stamp = document.getElementById('badge-stamp');
  var next  = document.getElementById('btn-1c-next');

  
  [icon, title, name, desc, stamp].forEach(function(el) {
    if (el) { el.style.animation = 'none'; el.style.opacity = '0'; }
  });
  if (next) next.style.display = 'none';

  
  title.textContent = '— 특별 임명장 —';
  
  var savedNick = STATE.nickname || '';
  var detectiveNames = [
    '마석도', '강철규', '박민준', '김태양', '이준혁',
    '최동훈', '정수철', '한민국', '오대영', '윤성호'
  ];
  var displayName = savedNick ||
    detectiveNames[Math.floor(Math.random() * detectiveNames.length)];
  name.textContent = displayName + ' 형사';
  desc.innerHTML    = '마약류 기초 테스트를 통과하였기에<br>정식 수사 자격을 부여합니다.<br><br>나쁜 놈 잡는 데는 이유 없고 제한 없다!';

  
  setTimeout(function() {
    icon.style.animation  = 'badgeDrop 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1) forwards';
    title.style.animation = 'fadeUp 0.5s ease 0.9s forwards';
    name.style.animation  = 'fadeUp 0.5s ease 1.1s forwards';
    desc.style.animation  = 'fadeUp 0.5s ease 1.3s forwards';
    stamp.style.animation = 'stampIn 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1) 1.6s forwards';
  }, 50);

  
  setTimeout(function() {
    if (next) {
      next.style.display = 'block';
      next.style.animation = 'fadeInUp 0.5s ease forwards';
    }
  }, 2600);
}

var CHECKLIST_ITEMS = [
  { text: '나는 지금 이 순간, 대세불가 괴물형사, 민중의 몽둥이! 하지만 두뇌까지 갖췄지.', highlight: false },
  { text: '살인사건 수사 중 신종 마약 사건에 연루되었음을 알게 되었다.', highlight: false },
  { text: `범인은 마약을 무단으로 생산하고 <span class="gold">'던지기 수법'</span>을 이용해 판매한다.`, highlight: false },
  { text: '클럽에서 수백 수천만원을 쓰면서 타겟을 정하고, 몰래 마약탄 술을 먹여 범죄를 저지른다.', highlight: false, single: true },
  { text: '숨겨진 마약을 찾아, 범인을 검거하자!<br>나쁜 놈 잡는 데는 이유 없고 제한 없다!', highlight: true, nocheck: true, center: true },
];

function showChecklist() {
  var wrap = document.getElementById('checklist-wrap');
  if (!wrap) return;
  wrap.innerHTML = '';

  
  CHECKLIST_ITEMS.forEach(function(item) {
    var div = document.createElement('div');
    div.className = 'check-item' + (item.highlight ? ' highlight' : '') + (item.center ? ' center-item' : '');
    if (item.nocheck) {
      
      div.innerHTML = '<div class="check-text center-text">' + item.text + '</div>';
    } else {
      div.innerHTML =
        '<div class="check-box"></div>' +
        '<div class="check-text">' + item.text + '</div>';
    }
    wrap.appendChild(div);
  });

  
  var items = wrap.querySelectorAll('.check-item');
  items.forEach(function(el, idx) {
    setTimeout(function() {
      el.classList.add('visible');
      
      if (idx === items.length - 1) {
        setTimeout(function() {
          var nextBtn = document.getElementById('btn-0b-next');
          if (nextBtn) {
            nextBtn.style.display = 'block';
            nextBtn.style.animation = 'fadeInUp 0.4s ease forwards';
          }
        }, 500);
      }
    }, idx * 600);
  });
}

function checkNickname() {
  var val = document.getElementById('nickname-input').value.trim();
  var btn = document.getElementById('btn-start-briefing');
  if (btn) btn.disabled = (val.length === 0);
}

function startBriefing() {
  var val = document.getElementById('nickname-input').value.trim();
  if (!val) return;
  STATE.nickname = val;
  showScreen('0b');
}

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  var frame = document.querySelector('.exit-door-frame');
  if (frame) frame.addEventListener('click', function(){ startBriefing(); });
});

function showScreen(n) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.screen').forEach(function(s){ s.classList.remove('active'); });
  var screenEl = document.getElementById('screen-' + n);
  if (screenEl) screenEl.classList.add('active');
  window.scrollTo({top: 0, behavior: 'smooth'});
  updateProgressBar(n); 
  STATE.currentStage = n;

  requestAnimationFrame(function() {
    requestAnimationFrame(function() {
      
      if (n === '0b') { showChecklist(); return; }
      
      if (n === '1c') { startBadgeScene(); return; }
      if (n === '5a') {
        var el5a = document.getElementById('narrative-5a');
        var txt5a = NARRATIVES['5a'];
        if (el5a && txt5a) {
          el5a.innerHTML = '';
          setTimeout(function(){
            typeText('narrative-5a', txt5a, 35, function(){
              var nb = document.getElementById('btn-5a-next');
              if (nb) { nb.style.display = 'block'; nb.style.animation = 'fadeInUp 0.4s ease forwards'; }
            });
          }, 200);
        }
        return;
      }

      var narId = 'narrative-' + n;
      var narText = NARRATIVES[n];
      var el = document.getElementById(narId);
      if (!el || !narText) return;
      el.innerHTML = '';
      setTimeout(function() {
        typeText(narId, narText, 35, function() {
          var nextBtn = document.getElementById('btn-' + n + '-next');
          if (nextBtn) {
            nextBtn.style.display = 'block';
            nextBtn.style.animation = 'fadeInUp 0.4s ease forwards';
          }
        });
      }, 200);
    });
  });
}

function updateProgressBar(n) {
  var displayN;
  if (n === '0a' || n === '0b' || n === '0c') displayN = 0;
  else if (n === '1b' || n === '1c' || n === '1d' || n === 1) displayN = 1;
  else if (n === '2a' || n === '2-1' || n === '2-2' || n === '2-3' || n === '2-4' || n === 2) displayN = 2;
  else if (n === '3a' || n === '3-1' || n === '3-2' || n === '3-3' || n === '3-4' || n === 3) displayN = 3;
  else if (n === '4a' || n === '4b' || n === '4-1' || n === '4-2' || n === '4-3' || n === '4-4' || n === 4) displayN = 4;
  else if (n === 5 || n === '5a' || n === '5b' || n === '5c') displayN = 5;
  else displayN = typeof n === 'number' ? n : 0;
  for (var i = 0; i <= 5; i++) {
    var dot = document.getElementById('dot-' + i);
    var line = document.getElementById('line-' + i);
    if (!dot) continue;
    dot.classList.remove('active', 'done');
    if (i < displayN) dot.classList.add('done');
    else if (i === displayN) dot.classList.add('active');
    if (line) {
      line.classList.remove('done');
      if (i < displayN) line.classList.add('done');
    }
  }
}

function startGame() {
  startTimer();
  showScreen('1b');
}

function goToStage(n) {
  showScreen(n);
}

function startTimer() {
  document.getElementById("timer-display").style.display = "block";
  STATE.timerSec = STATE.timerMin * 60;
  STATE.timerInterval = setInterval(function() {
    STATE.timerSec--;
    var m = Math.floor(STATE.timerSec / 60);
    var s = STATE.timerSec % 60;
    var el = document.getElementById('timer-display');
    el.textContent = (m < 10 ? '0' : '') + m + ':' + (s < 10 ? '0' : '') + s;
    if (STATE.timerSec <= 300) el.classList.add('urgent');
    if (STATE.timerSec <= 0) {
      clearInterval(STATE.timerInterval);
      el.textContent = '00:00';
      _timeoutExplosion();
    }
  }, 1000);
}

// ══ 드래그앤드롭 퍼즐 (Stage 1-1) ══
var _dndSlots = [null, null, null];
var _dndDragging = null;

// 카드 목록: 정답(펜,타,닐) + 오답 섞기
var _dndCards = ['펜', '타', '닐', '코', '카', '인'];

function _initDnD() {
  var pool = document.getElementById('q1-card-pool');
  if (!pool) return;
  pool.innerHTML = '';
  _dndSlots = [null, null, null];
  // 슬롯 초기화
  for (var z = 0; z < 3; z++) {
    var zone = document.getElementById('dz-' + z);
    zone.innerHTML = '<span class="dnd-zone-placeholder">?</span>';
    zone.classList.remove('filled','over');
  }
  // 카드 셞기
  var shuffled = _dndCards.slice().sort(function(){ return Math.random()-0.5; });
  shuffled.forEach(function(word) {
    var card = document.createElement('div');
    card.className = 'dnd-card';
    card.textContent = word;
    card.draggable = true;
    card.dataset.word = word;
    card.addEventListener('dragstart', function(e) {
      _dndDragging = this;
      this.classList.add('dragging');
      e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed = 'move';
      e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain', word);
    });
    card.addEventListener('dragend', function() { this.classList.remove('dragging'); });
    // 터치 지원
    card.addEventListener('touchstart', _touchStart, { passive: false });
    card.addEventListener('touchmove', _touchMove, { passive: false });
    card.addEventListener('touchend', _touchEnd);
    pool.appendChild(card);
  });
}

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() { _initDnD(); });

// 터치 드래그 변수
var _touchCard = null, _touchClone = null, _touchStartX = 0, _touchStartY = 0;

function _touchStart(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  _touchCard = this;
  var t = e.touches[0];
  _touchStartX = t.clientX; _touchStartY = t.clientY;
  _touchClone = this.cloneNode(true);
  _touchClone.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;z-index:9999;opacity:0.85;pointer-events:none;';
  _touchClone.style.left = (t.clientX - 30) + 'px';
  _touchClone.style.top  = (t.clientY - 20) + 'px';
  document.body.appendChild(_touchClone);
  this.classList.add('dragging');
}
function _touchMove(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  var t = e.touches[0];
  if (_touchClone) {
    _touchClone.style.left = (t.clientX - 30) + 'px';
    _touchClone.style.top  = (t.clientY - 20) + 'px';
  }
  // 존 하이라이트
  document.querySelectorAll('.dnd-zone').forEach(function(z){ z.classList.remove('over'); });
  var el = document.elementFromPoint(t.clientX, t.clientY);
  var zone = el && el.closest('.dnd-zone');
  if (zone) zone.classList.add('over');
}
function _touchEnd(e) {
  if (_touchClone) { document.body.removeChild(_touchClone); _touchClone = null; }
  if (!_touchCard) return;
  _touchCard.classList.remove('dragging');
  var t = e.changedTouches[0];
  var el = document.elementFromPoint(t.clientX, t.clientY);
  var zone = el && el.closest('.dnd-zone');
  if (zone) {
    var idx = parseInt(zone.id.replace('dz-',''));
    _placeCard(_touchCard.dataset.word, idx, _touchCard);
  }
  _touchCard = null;
}

function dndOver(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  e.currentTarget.classList.add('over');
}
function dndLeave(e) { e.currentTarget.classList.remove('over'); }

function dndDrop(e, idx) {
  e.preventDefault();
  e.currentTarget.classList.remove('over');
  var word = e.dataTransfer.getData('text/plain');
  _placeCard(word, idx, _dndDragging);
}

function _placeCard(word, idx, cardEl) {
  _dndSlots.forEach(function(w, i) {
    if (w === word && i !== idx) _clearSlot(i);
  });
  if (_dndSlots[idx] !== null && _dndSlots[idx] !== word) {
    _returnToPool(_dndSlots[idx]);
  }
  _dndSlots[idx] = word;
  var zone = document.getElementById('dz-' + idx);
  zone.classList.add('filled');
  zone.innerHTML = '';
  var placed = document.createElement('div');
  placed.className = 'dnd-placed-card';
  placed.textContent = word;
  placed.title = '클릭하면 되돌리기';
  placed.dataset.word = word;
  placed.dataset.idx = idx;
  placed.addEventListener('click', function() {
    _returnToPool(this.dataset.word, parseInt(this.dataset.idx));
  });
  zone.appendChild(placed);
  if (cardEl) cardEl.classList.add('placed');
  else {
    document.querySelectorAll('.dnd-card').forEach(function(c) {
      if (c.dataset.word === word) c.classList.add('placed');
    });
  }
}

function _clearSlot(idx) {
  _dndSlots[idx] = null;
  var zone = document.getElementById('dz-' + idx);
  zone.classList.remove('filled');
  zone.innerHTML = '<span class="dnd-zone-placeholder">?</span>';
}

function _returnToPool(word, idx) {
  if (idx !== undefined) _clearSlot(idx);
  else {
    _dndSlots.forEach(function(w, i){ if (w === word) _clearSlot(i); });
  }
  document.querySelectorAll('.dnd-card').forEach(function(c){
    if (c.dataset.word === word) c.classList.remove('placed');
  });
}

function submitStage1() {
  var filled = _dndSlots.filter(Boolean);
  if (filled.length < 3) { alert('세 칸을 모두 채워주세요!'); return; }
  var val = _dndSlots.join('');
  var keywords = ['합성 오피오이드', '펜타닐', '오피오이드', '합성오피오이드', '합성오피오이드계열', '펜타닐'];
  var isCorrect = _dndSlots[0] === '펜' && _dndSlots[1] === '타' && _dndSlots[2] === '닐';

  var fb = document.getElementById('q1-feedback');
  fb.style.display = 'block';

  if (isCorrect) {
    fb.className = 'feedback correct';
    fb.innerHTML = '<div class="feedback-title correct">정답!</div><div class="feedback-text">합성 오피오이드(펜타닐 등)는 뇌의 오피오이드 수용체를 과도하게 자극해 근육 제어 기능을 마비시킵니다. 그 결과 근육이 갑자기 굳거나 풀려 몸을 가누지 못하고, 비틀거리거나 90도로 꺾인 채 걷게 됩니다. 의식은 있지만 뇌와 근육의 연결이 끊어진 상태라 마치 좀비처럼 보이는 것입니다.</div>';
    document.getElementById('btn-q1-submit').style.display = 'none';
    document.getElementById('btn-stage1-next').style.display = 'block';
    saveResponse('Q1-1', val, true);
  } else {
    fb.className = 'feedback wrong';
    fb.innerHTML = '<div class="feedback-title wrong">틀렸어!</div><div class="feedback-text">카드를 다시 배치해보세요. 힌트를 참고해도 좋아요.</div>';
    addWrong();
    // 틀리면 슬롯 초기화
    setTimeout(function(){
      _initDnD();
      fb.style.display = 'none';
    }, 1200);
  }
}

function selectOption(btn, qid, correctAnswer) {
  
  if (STATE.answers[qid] && STATE.answers[qid].correct) return;

  var opts = btn.parentElement.querySelectorAll('.option-btn');
  var isOX = (correctAnswer === 'O' || correctAnswer === 'X');

  
  var selected;
  if (isOX) {
    selected = btn.textContent.includes('⭕') ? 'O' : 'X';
  } else {
    var match = btn.textContent.trim().match(/^(\d+)\./);
    selected = match ? match[1] : String(Array.from(opts).indexOf(btn) + 1);
  }

  var isCorrect = (selected === String(correctAnswer));
  var fb = document.getElementById('fb-' + qid);
  fb.style.display = 'block';

  if (isCorrect) {
    
    STATE.answers[qid] = { answer: selected, correct: true };
    opts.forEach(function(b) {
      b.disabled = true;
      b.classList.remove('selected', 'wrong');
      var bVal = isOX ? (b.textContent.includes('⭕') ? 'O' : 'X')
                      : (b.textContent.trim().match(/^(\d+)\./) || [])[1];
      if (String(bVal) === String(correctAnswer)) b.classList.add('correct');
    });
    fb.className = 'feedback correct';
    var wrongExp = '';
    if (WRONG_EXPLANATIONS[qid] && WRONG_EXPLANATIONS[qid][selected]) {
      wrongExp = WRONG_EXPLANATIONS[qid][selected];
    }
    fb.innerHTML = '<div class="feedback-icon">✅</div>'
      + '<div class="feedback-title correct">정답!</div>'
      + '<div class="feedback-text">' + (wrongExp || EXPLANATIONS[qid] || '') + '</div>';
    saveResponse('Q' + qid, selected, true);
    checkStageProgress();
    
    fillAnswerSlot(qid, selected);
    
    var nxtBtn = document.getElementById('btn-' + qid + '-next');
    if (nxtBtn) setTimeout(function(){ nxtBtn.style.display='block'; }, 600);

  } else {
    
    var alreadyWrong = btn.classList.contains('wrong');
    
    STATE.answers[qid] = null;
    opts.forEach(function(b) { b.classList.remove('selected', 'wrong', 'correct'); });
    btn.classList.add('wrong');
    
    var wrongExp = '';
    if (WRONG_EXPLANATIONS[qid] && WRONG_EXPLANATIONS[qid][selected]) {
      wrongExp = WRONG_EXPLANATIONS[qid][selected];
    } else {
      wrongExp = EXPLANATIONS[qid] || '';
    }
    fb.className = 'feedback wrong';
    fb.innerHTML = '<div class="feedback-icon">❌</div>'
      + '<div class="feedback-title wrong">오답! 다시 선택해보세요.</div>'
      + '<div class="feedback-text">' + wrongExp + '</div>';
    
    if (!alreadyWrong) addWrong();
  }
}

function checkStageProgress() {
  
  var all2 = ['2-1','2-2','2-3','2-4'].every(function(q){ return STATE.answers[q] && STATE.answers[q].correct; });
  if (all2 && document.getElementById('stage2-password-area')) {
    setTimeout(function(){ document.getElementById('stage2-password-area').style.display = 'block'; }, 800);
  }
  
  var all3 = ['3-1','3-2','3-3','3-4'].every(function(q){ return STATE.answers[q] && STATE.answers[q].correct; });
  if (all3 && document.getElementById('stage3-password-area')) {
    setTimeout(function(){ document.getElementById('stage3-password-area').style.display = 'block'; }, 800);
  }
  
  var all4 = ['4-2','4-3','4-4'].every(function(q){ return STATE.answers[q] && STATE.answers[q].correct; });
  if (all4 && document.getElementById('stage4-password-area')) {
    setTimeout(function(){ document.getElementById('stage4-password-area').style.display = 'block'; }, 800);
  }
}

function _checkStage(num) {
  var m = _STAGE_META[num];
  var ok = m.qs.every(function(qid){ return STATE.answers[qid] && STATE.answers[qid].correct; });
  if (ok) {
    document.getElementById(m.pw).style.display = 'block';
    if (m.hide) document.getElementById(m.hide).style.display = 'none';
  } else { alert(m.errMsg); }
}

function checkStage4(){ _checkStage(4); }

function kpPress(stage, num) {
  if (STATE.kpBuffer[stage].length >= 4) return;
  STATE.kpBuffer[stage] += String(num);
  updateKpDisplay(stage);
}
function kpDel(stage) {
  STATE.kpBuffer[stage] = STATE.kpBuffer[stage].slice(0, -1);
  updateKpDisplay(stage);
}
function updateKpDisplay(stage) {
  var buf = STATE.kpBuffer[stage];
  var filled = buf + '____'.slice(buf.length);
  document.getElementById('kp' + stage + '-display').textContent = filled.split('').join(' ');
}
function kpEnter(stage) {
  var input = STATE.kpBuffer[stage];
  var correct = STATE.passwords[stage];
  var result = document.getElementById('kp' + stage + '-result');

  if (input === correct) {
    result.className = 'keypad-result correct';
    result.textContent = '✅ 암호가 일치합니다!';
    setTimeout(function(){
      if (stage === 2) {
        document.getElementById('btn-stage2-next').style.display = 'block';
      } else if (stage === 3) {
        document.getElementById('btn-stage3-next').style.display = 'block';
      } else if (stage === 4) {
        document.getElementById('btn-stage4-next').style.display = 'block';
      }
    }, 600);
  } else {
    result.className = 'keypad-result wrong';
    result.textContent = '❌ 암호가 틀렸습니다. 다시 시도하세요.';
    STATE.kpBuffer[stage] = '';
    setTimeout(function(){
      updateKpDisplay(stage);
      result.className = 'keypad-result';
      result.style.display = 'none';
    }, 1500);
  }
  result.style.display = 'block';
}

var HINTS = {
  'q1': [

function showHint(qid, level) {
  if (!STATE.hintCount[qid]) STATE.hintCount[qid] = 0;
  if (STATE.hintCount[qid] >= 2) { alert('힌트를 모두 사용했습니다!'); return; }
  var hints = HINTS[qid];
  if (!hints) return;
  var idx = STATE.hintCount[qid];
  var box = document.getElementById(qid + '-hint' + (idx+1));
  if (box) { box.textContent = hints[idx]; box.style.display = 'block'; }
  STATE.hintCount[qid]++;
}

function typeText(elementId, htmlString, speed, callback) {
  var el = document.getElementById(elementId);
  if (!el) { if (callback) callback(); return; }
  el.innerHTML = '';

  
  var tokens = [];
  var temp = document.createElement('div');
  temp.innerHTML = htmlString;

  function parseNode(node) {
    if (node.nodeType === 3) {
      
      var txt = node.textContent;
      for (var c = 0; c < txt.length; c++) {
        tokens.push({ type: 'char', char: txt[c], tag: null });
      }
    } else if (node.nodeType === 1) {
      
      var tagName = node.tagName.toLowerCase();
      var attrs = '';
      for (var a = 0; a < node.attributes.length; a++) {
        attrs += ' ' + node.attributes[a].name + '="' + node.attributes[a].value + '"';
      }
      tokens.push({ type: 'open', tag: '<' + tagName + attrs + '>' });
      node.childNodes.forEach(function(child) { parseNode(child); });
      tokens.push({ type: 'close', tag: '</' + tagName + '>' });
    }
  }
  temp.childNodes.forEach(function(node) { parseNode(node); });

  
  var cursorEl = document.createElement('span');
  cursorEl.className = 'typing-cursor';

  var i = 0;
  
  var builtHtml = '';
  
  var tagStack = [];

  function type() {
    if (i >= tokens.length) {
      el.innerHTML = builtHtml;
      setTimeout(function() {
        if (callback) callback();
      }, 400);
      return;
    }

    var token = tokens[i];
    i++;

    if (token.type === 'open') {
      builtHtml += token.tag;
      tagStack.push(token.tag);
      type();
      return;
    } else if (token.type === 'close') {
      builtHtml += token.tag;
      tagStack.pop();
      type();
      return;
    } else {
      
      builtHtml += (token.char === '\n' ? '<br>' : token.char);
      
      var closeTags = tagStack.map(function(t) {
        return '</' + t.replace('<','').replace('>','').split(' ')[0] + '>';
      }).reverse().join('');
      el.innerHTML = builtHtml + closeTags + '<span class="typing-cursor"></span>';

      var delay = speed;
      if (token.char === '.' || token.char === '!' || token.char === '?') delay = speed * 5;
      else if (token.char === ',') delay = speed * 2;
      else if (token.char === '\n') delay = speed * 3;

      setTimeout(type, delay);
    }
  }
  type();
}

var NARRATIVES = {

  '2a': "거대 범죄 조직이 운영하는 버려진 요트장이 있다고 해서 왔다.\n나쁜 놈들은 요트장을 왜 운영하는 걸까?\n수십 대의 요트 열쇠 뭉치를 발견했다.\n그 중에 유일한 카드키 하나!\n누가봐도 수상하다.\n당장 요트로 달려가자!",

  '4a': "세상에, 마약은 없고 폭탄이 설치되어 있다.\n나쁜 놈들이 여기를 올 것이라는 것을 알고 있던 걸까.\n당장 폭탄 제거가 우선!",
  '5a': "휴...뛰어난 두뇌로 폭탄까지 제거했다.\n숨겨진 마약을 찾아야하는데 대체 어디에 숨긴걸까.\n근데 요트 바닥에 왜이렇게 줄이 많지?\n잔머리만 좋아가지고.\n\n범죄조직의 마약이 어디에 숨겨졌는지는 범죄도시3을 통해서 확인하세요~ㅋㅋ",
};

var BOMB = {
  wrongCount: 0,   
  maxWrong: 6,     
  retryLeft: 2,    
  paused: false,
};

function startStage4() {
  BOMB.wrongCount = 0;
  BOMB.paused = false;
  updateGaugeUI();
  showScreen('4b');
}

function addWrong() {
  // 타이머 5초 차감 — 모든 stage
  STATE.timerSec = Math.max(0, STATE.timerSec - 5);
  var timerEl = document.getElementById('timer-display');
  if (timerEl) {
    var m = Math.floor(STATE.timerSec / 60);
    var s = STATE.timerSec % 60;
    timerEl.textContent = (m < 10 ? '0' : '') + m + ':' + (s < 10 ? '0' : '') + s;
    timerEl.style.color = 'var(--red)';
    timerEl.style.transform = 'scale(1.2)';
    setTimeout(function() {
      timerEl.style.color = '';
      timerEl.style.transform = '';
    }, 600);
    if (STATE.timerSec <= 0) {
      clearInterval(STATE.timerInterval);
      _timeoutExplosion();
      return;
    }
  }

  // 폭탄 게이지 & 폭발 — Stage 4 전용
  var cur = String(STATE.currentStage);
  var isStage4 = (cur === '4b' || cur === '4-1' || cur === '4-2' || cur === '4-3' || cur === '4-4');
  if (isStage4) {
    if (BOMB.paused) return;
    BOMB.wrongCount++;
    updateGaugeUI();
    document.querySelectorAll('.bomb-gauge-wrap').forEach(function(el) {
      el.style.animation = 'segPop 0.3s ease';
      setTimeout(function(){ el.style.animation = ''; }, 300);
    });
    if (BOMB.wrongCount >= BOMB.maxWrong) {
      setTimeout(function(){ triggerExplosion(); }, 400);
    }
  }
}

function updateGaugeUI() {
  var pct = (BOMB.wrongCount / BOMB.maxWrong) * 100;
  
  ['bomb-gauge-bar','bomb-bar-2','bomb-bar-3','bomb-bar-4'].forEach(function(id) {
    var el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (el) el.style.width = pct + '%';
  });
  
  ['wrong-count-display','wrong-disp-2','wrong-disp-3','wrong-disp-4'].forEach(function(id) {
    var el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (el) el.textContent = BOMB.wrongCount;
  });
  
  ['retry-count','retry-count-2','retry-count-3','retry-count-4'].forEach(function(id) {
    var el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (el) el.textContent = BOMB.retryLeft;
  });
  
  for (var i = 1; i <= 6; i++) {
    var seg = document.getElementById('seg-' + i);
    if (!seg) continue;
    if (i <= BOMB.wrongCount) {
      seg.classList.add('lit');
      if (i === BOMB.wrongCount && i === BOMB.maxWrong) seg.classList.add('final');
    } else {
      seg.classList.remove('lit', 'final');
    }
  }
}

function _timeoutExplosion() {
  var overlay = document.getElementById('bomb-explode-overlay');
  overlay.style.display = 'flex';
  document.getElementById('app').style.animation = 'screenShake 0.6s ease';
  setTimeout(function(){ document.getElementById('app').style.animation = ''; }, 600);
  var retryMsg = document.getElementById('retry-msg');
  var retryBtn = document.getElementById('retry-btn');
  retryMsg.textContent = '⏰ 제한시간 5분이 초과되었습니다! 처음부터 다시 시작해주세요.';
  retryBtn.textContent = '처음으로 돌아가기';
  retryBtn.onclick = function() {
    overlay.style.display = 'none';
    location.reload();
  };
}

function triggerExplosion() {
  var overlay = document.getElementById('bomb-explode-overlay');
  overlay.style.display = 'flex';
  document.getElementById('app').style.animation = 'screenShake 0.6s ease';
  setTimeout(function(){ document.getElementById('app').style.animation = ''; }, 600);

  var retryMsg = document.getElementById('retry-msg');
  var retryBtn = document.getElementById('retry-btn');

  if (BOMB.retryLeft > 0) {
    retryMsg.textContent = '재도전 기회가 ' + BOMB.retryLeft + '번 남았습니다.';
    retryBtn.textContent = '🔄 재도전하기';
  } else {
    retryMsg.textContent = '재도전 기회를 모두 사용했습니다. 처음부터 다시 시작해야 합니다.';
    retryBtn.textContent = '🏠 처음으로 돌아가기';
  }
}

function retryStage4() {
  var overlay = document.getElementById('bomb-explode-overlay');
  overlay.style.display = 'none';

  if (BOMB.retryLeft > 0) {
    BOMB.retryLeft--;
    BOMB.wrongCount = 0;
    BOMB.paused = false;
    ['dd-1','dd-2','dd-3'].forEach(function(id){ _ddState[id]={lastWrong:null,correct:false}; });

    
    ['4-2','4-3','4-4'].forEach(function(q){ STATE.answers[q] = null; });

    
    ['dd-1','dd-2','dd-3'].forEach(function(id){
      var el = document.getElementById(id);
      if (el) { el.value = ''; el.className = 'concept-dropdown'; }
    });
    var fb = document.getElementById('dropdown-feedback');
    if (fb) fb.style.display = 'none';
    var cnext = document.getElementById('btn-concept-next');
    if (cnext) cnext.style.display = 'none';

    
    ['4-2','4-3','4-4'].forEach(function(q){
      var nxt = document.getElementById('btn-' + q.replace('-','-') + '-next');
      
      var nxtId = 'btn-4-' + q.split('-')[1] + '-next';
      var nxtEl = document.getElementById(nxtId);
      if (nxtEl) nxtEl.style.display = 'none';
      var opts = document.getElementById('opts-' + q);
      if (opts) opts.querySelectorAll('.option-btn').forEach(function(b){
        b.disabled = false; b.classList.remove('correct','wrong','selected');
      });
      var fbb = document.getElementById('fb-' + q);
      if (fbb) { fbb.style.display = 'none'; fbb.className = 'feedback'; }
    });
    _bombCounts = [0,0,0];
    ['bomb-count-0','bomb-count-1','bomb-count-2'].forEach(function(id,i){
      var el=document.getElementById(id); if(el) el.textContent='0';
    });
    ['bomb-slot-0','bomb-slot-1','bomb-slot-2'].forEach(function(id){
      var el=document.getElementById(id); if(el) el.classList.remove('solved');
    });
    ['bomb-icon-0','bomb-icon-1','bomb-icon-2'].forEach(function(id){
      var el=document.getElementById(id); if(el) el.textContent='💣';
    });
    var pa = document.getElementById('stage4-password-area');
    if (pa) pa.style.display = 'none';
    var sn = document.getElementById('btn-stage4-next');
    if (sn) sn.style.display = 'none';

    updateGaugeUI();
    showScreen('4b');
  } else {
    BOMB.retryLeft = 2;
    BOMB.wrongCount = 0;
    showScreen('0a');
  }
}

function togglePause() {
  BOMB.paused = !BOMB.paused;
  var overlay = document.getElementById('pause-overlay');
  overlay.style.display = BOMB.paused ? 'flex' : 'none';
  document.querySelectorAll('.pause-btn').forEach(function(btn) {
    btn.textContent = BOMB.paused ? '▶' : '⏸';
    btn.classList.toggle('paused', BOMB.paused);
  });
}

// 드롭다운 각 칸을 개별 문제로 처리
// _ddState[id] = { lastWrong: null, correct: false }
var _ddState = { 'dd-1': { lastWrong: null, correct: false },
                 'dd-2': { lastWrong: null, correct: false },
                 'dd-3': { lastWrong: null, correct: false } };

function checkDropdown() {
  var CORRECT = '도파민';
  var ids = ['dd-1', 'dd-2', 'dd-3'];
  var allCorrect = true;
  var hasWrong = false;

  ids.forEach(function(id) {
    var el = document.getElementById(id);
    var val = el.value;
    if (!val) { allCorrect = false; return; }

    var st = _ddState[id];
    var isCorrect = (val === CORRECT);

    if (isCorrect) {
      el.className = 'concept-dropdown correct';
      st.lastWrong = null;
      st.correct = true;
    } else {
      allCorrect = false;
      hasWrong = true;
      el.className = 'concept-dropdown wrong';
      st.correct = false;
      if (val !== st.lastWrong) {
        st.lastWrong = val;
        addWrong();
      }
    }
  });

  var fb = document.getElementById('dropdown-feedback');

  // 오답인 칸이 하나도 없으면 피드백 숨김
  if (!hasWrong && !allCorrect) {
    fb.style.display = 'none';
    return;
  }

  fb.style.display = 'block';

  var allFilled = ids.every(function(id) {
    return !!document.getElementById(id).value;
  });

  if (allFilled && allCorrect) {
    fb.style.background = 'rgba(57,224,122,0.15)';
    fb.style.border = '1px solid var(--green-light)';
    fb.style.color = 'var(--green-light)';
    fb.innerHTML = '✅ 정답! 도파민은 뇌의 보상 회로를 활성화하는 신경전달물질입니다.';
    setTimeout(function(){
      document.getElementById('btn-concept-next').style.display = 'block';
    }, 600);
  } else if (hasWrong) {
    // 정답인 칸은 언급하지 않고, 오답 칸만 안내
    var wrongCount = ids.filter(function(id) {
      return _ddState[id].correct === false && !!document.getElementById(id).value;
    }).length;
    var msg = wrongCount < 3
      ? '❌ 아직 틀린 칸이 있어요! 힌트: 세 칸 모두 같은 신경전달물질입니다.'
      : '❌ 오답! 세 칸 모두 같은 신경전달물질이 들어갑니다. 다시 선택해보세요.';
    fb.style.background = 'rgba(232,66,10,0.12)';
    fb.style.border = '1px solid rgba(232,66,10,0.4)';
    fb.style.color = '#ff6b6b';
    fb.innerHTML = msg;
  }
}

var SLOT_ANSWERS = {}; 

var SLOT_LABELS = {
  '2-1': '금단',
  '2-2': '내성',
  '2-3': '의존성',
  '2-4': '사회적 피해',
};

var SLOT_LABELS_3 = {
  '3-1': 'O(1번)',
  '3-2': 'O(1번)',
  '3-3': 'X(2번)',
  '3-4': '니코틴',
};

function fillAnswerSlot(qid, answerNum) {
  SLOT_ANSWERS[qid] = answerNum;

  
  var qOrder2 = ['2-1','2-2','2-3','2-4'];
  var screens2 = {
    '2-1': ['slot-2-1','slot-2-2','slot-2-3','slot-2-4'],
    '2-2': ['slot-2-1-2','slot-2-2-2','slot-2-3-2','slot-2-4-2'],
    '2-3': ['slot-2-1-3','slot-2-2-3','slot-2-3-3','slot-2-4-3'],
    '2-4': ['slot-final-1','slot-final-2','slot-final-3','slot-final-4'],
  };
  Object.keys(screens2).forEach(function(screenQ) {
    var slotIds = screens2[screenQ];
    qOrder2.forEach(function(q, idx) {
      var slotEl = document.getElementById(slotIds[idx]);
      if (!slotEl) return;
      if (SLOT_ANSWERS[q]) {
        slotEl.innerHTML =
          '<span>' + SLOT_ANSWERS[q] + '</span>' +
          '<span class="slot-label">' + (SLOT_LABELS[q] || '') + '</span>';
        slotEl.classList.add('filled');
      }
    });
  });

  
  var SLOT_LABELS_4 = { '4-2': 'X(2번)', '4-3': '메스마우스', '4-4': '메스암페타민' };
  var qOrder4 = ['4-2','4-3','4-4'];
  var screens4 = {
    '4-2': ['s4-slot-1-2','s4-slot-2-2','s4-slot-3-2'],
    '4-3': ['s4-slot-1-3','s4-slot-2-3','s4-slot-3-3'],
    '4-4': ['s4-slot-1-4','s4-slot-2-4','s4-slot-3-4'],
  };
  Object.keys(screens4).forEach(function(screenQ) {
    var slotIds = screens4[screenQ];
    qOrder4.forEach(function(q, idx) {
      var slotEl = document.getElementById(slotIds[idx]);
      if (!slotEl) return;
      if (SLOT_ANSWERS[q]) {
        slotEl.innerHTML = '<span>' + SLOT_ANSWERS[q] + '</span><span class="slot-label">' + (SLOT_LABELS_4[q] || '') + '</span>';
        slotEl.classList.add('filled');
      }
    });
  });

  
  var qOrder3 = ['3-1','3-2','3-3','3-4'];
  var screens3 = {
    '3-1': ['s3-slot-1','s3-slot-2','s3-slot-3','s3-slot-4'],
    '3-2': ['s3-slot-1-2','s3-slot-2-2','s3-slot-3-2','s3-slot-4-2'],
    '3-3': ['s3-slot-1-3','s3-slot-2-3','s3-slot-3-3','s3-slot-4-3'],
    '3-4': ['s3-slot-1-4','s3-slot-2-4','s3-slot-3-4','s3-slot-4-4'],
  };
  Object.keys(screens3).forEach(function(screenQ) {
    var slotIds = screens3[screenQ];
    qOrder3.forEach(function(q, idx) {
      var slotEl = document.getElementById(slotIds[idx]);
      if (!slotEl) return;
      if (SLOT_ANSWERS[q]) {
        slotEl.innerHTML =
          '<span>' + SLOT_ANSWERS[q] + '</span>' +
          '<span class="slot-label">' + (SLOT_LABELS_3[q] || '') + '</span>';
        slotEl.classList.add('filled');
      }
    });
  });
}

function saveResponse(questionId, answer, isCorrect) {
  try {
    google.script.run.saveResponse(
      STATE.sessionId,
      STATE.currentStage,
      questionId,
      answer,
      isCorrect,
      1,
      0
    );
  } catch(e) {
    
    console.log('saveResponse (local):', questionId, answer, isCorrect);
  }
}

function submitFinal() {
  var num    = document.getElementById('student-num').value.trim();
  var name   = document.getElementById('student-name').value.trim();
  var pledge = document.getElementById('student-pledge').value.trim();

  if (!num || !name || !pledge) {
    alert('학번, 이름, 다짐을 모두 입력해주세요!');
    return;
  }
  if (num.length !== 5 || isNaN(num)) {
    alert('학번은 5자리 숫자로 입력해주세요!');
    return;
  }

  // 수료증 먼저 표시 후 화면 이동 (서버 응답 여부와 무관하게)
  clearInterval(STATE.timerInterval);
  _showCertificate();
  showScreen('5c');
  window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });

  // 백그라운드에서 서버 저장 시도
  try {
    google.script.run
      .withSuccessHandler(function(res) {
        var msg = document.getElementById('final-message');
        if (msg && res && res.message) msg.textContent = res.message;
      })
      .submitPledge(num, name, pledge, STATE.currentStage, STATE.sessionId);
  } catch(e) {
    console.log('서버 저장 없이 로컬 실행');
  }
}

var _dialValues = [0, 0, 0, 0];
var _dialSpinning = [false, false, false, false];

function dialStep(idx, d) {
  if (_dialSpinning[idx]) return;
  _dialValues[idx] = (_dialValues[idx] + d + 10) % 10;
  _runSlot(idx, _dialValues[idx]);
}
function dialUp(idx)   { dialStep(idx,  1); }
function dialDown(idx) { dialStep(idx, -1); }

function _runSlot(idx, finalVal) {
  _dialSpinning[idx] = true;
  var el = document.getElementById('dial-' + idx);
  var ticks = 8;          // 랜덤 숫자 몇 번 보여줄지
  var interval = 60;      // ms 간격
  var count = 0;
  el.classList.add('spinning');
  var timer = setInterval(function() {
    if (count < ticks) {
      // 랜덤 숫자 (최종값 제외)
      var rnd;
      do { rnd = Math.floor(Math.random() * 10); } while (rnd === finalVal);
      el.textContent = rnd;
      count++;
    } else {
      clearInterval(timer);
      el.textContent = finalVal;
      el.classList.remove('spinning');
      _dialSpinning[idx] = false;
    }
  }, interval);
}
function dialEnter() {
  var input = _dialValues.join('');
  var pw = STATE.passwords[3] || '1121';
  var result = document.getElementById('kp3-result');
  if (input === pw) {
    result.textContent = '🔓 금고가 열렸다!';
    result.className = 'keypad-result correct';
    setTimeout(function() {
      document.getElementById('btn-stage3-next').style.display = 'block';
    }, 600);
  } else {
    result.textContent = '❌ 틀렸다! 다시 시도해보자';
    result.className = 'keypad-result wrong';
  }
}






// ══ 폭탄 탭 해제 ══
var _bombCounts = [0, 0, 0];
var _bombPw = '214';  // STATE.passwords[4] 로드 전 fallback

function bombTap(idx) {
  var pw = STATE.passwords[4] || _bombPw;
  var target = parseInt(pw[idx]) || 0;
  var cur = _bombCounts[idx];
  if (cur >= target && target > 0) return; // 이미 완료된 칸 추가 탭 방지
  _bombCounts[idx]++;
  var countEl = document.getElementById('bomb-count-' + idx);
  var iconEl  = document.getElementById('bomb-icon-' + idx);
  var slotEl  = document.getElementById('bomb-slot-' + idx);
  countEl.textContent = _bombCounts[idx];
  // 이모지 흔들기
  iconEl.classList.remove('shake');
  void iconEl.offsetWidth;
  iconEl.classList.add('shake');
  // 목표 도달 시 슬롯 완료 표시
  if (_bombCounts[idx] >= target && target > 0) {
    slotEl.classList.add('solved');
    iconEl.textContent = '✅';
  }
}

function bombReset(idx) {
  _bombCounts[idx] = 0;
  document.getElementById('bomb-count-' + idx).textContent = '0';
  document.getElementById('bomb-slot-' + idx).classList.remove('solved');
  document.getElementById('bomb-icon-' + idx).textContent = '💣';
  var result = document.getElementById('kp4-result');
  if (result) { result.className = 'keypad-result'; result.textContent = ''; }
}

function bombCheck() {
  var pw = STATE.passwords[4] || _bombPw;
  var result = document.getElementById('kp4-result');
  var allMatch = pw.split('').every(function(digit, i) {
    return _bombCounts[i] === parseInt(digit);
  });
  if (allMatch) {
    result.className = 'keypad-result correct';
    result.textContent = '✅ 폭탄 해제 성공! 🎉';
    result.style.display = 'block';
    clearInterval(STATE.timerInterval);
    setTimeout(function(){
      goToStage('5a');
    }, 1200);
  } else {
    result.className = 'keypad-result wrong';
    result.textContent = '❌ 틀렸습니다! 횟수를 다시 확인하세요.';
    result.style.display = 'block';
    setTimeout(function(){
      result.className = 'keypad-result'; result.textContent = ''; result.style.display='none';
    }, 1800);
  }
}


function applyPledgePreset() {
  var sel = document.getElementById('pledge-select');
  var textarea = document.getElementById('student-pledge');
  if (sel.value === 'direct' || sel.value === '') {
    textarea.value = '';
    textarea.focus();
  } else {
    textarea.value = sel.value;
  }
}


function _showCertificate() {
  var num    = document.getElementById('student-num').value.trim();
  var name   = document.getElementById('student-name').value.trim();
  var pledge = document.getElementById('student-pledge').value.trim();
  var today  = new Date();
  var dateStr = today.getFullYear() + '. '
    + String(today.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0') + '. '
    + String(today.getDate()).padStart(2,'0') + '.';

  document.getElementById('cert-name').textContent = name + ' 님';
  document.getElementById('cert-num').textContent  = '학번 ' + num;
  document.getElementById('cert-pledge').textContent = '"' + pledge + '"';
  document.getElementById('cert-date').textContent  = dateStr;
}


// ══ 배경음악 ══
var _bgmPlaying = false;
var _bgmStarted = false;

function _startBGM() {
  if (_bgmStarted) return;
  _bgmStarted = true;
  var bgm = document.getElementById('bgm');
  bgm.volume = 0.4;
  bgm.play().then(function() {
    _bgmPlaying = true;
    document.getElementById('bgm-btn').textContent = '🔊';
  }).catch(function() {
    _bgmPlaying = false;
    document.getElementById('bgm-btn').textContent = '🎵';
  });
}

function toggleBGM() {
  var bgm = document.getElementById('bgm');
  var btn = document.getElementById('bgm-btn');
  if (!_bgmStarted) {
    _startBGM(); return;
  }
  if (_bgmPlaying) {
    bgm.pause(); _bgmPlaying = false; btn.textContent = '🔇';
  } else {
    bgm.play(); _bgmPlaying = true; btn.textContent = '🔊';
  }
}

// 첫 터치/클릭 시 자동 시작
document.addEventListener('click', function() { _startBGM(); }, { once: true });
document.addEventListener('touchstart', function() { _startBGM(); }, { once: true });

</script>
<button id="bgm-btn" onclick="toggleBGM()" title="배경음악 켜기/끄기">🎵</button>
</body>
</html>
